name: The Ohio Democrats
subject: Mike DeWine just signed a dangerous anti-voter bill, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio Republicans know that their out-of-touch agenda and anti-worker policies are betraying Ohio voters, and they don’t want to be held accountable.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57064618/386767099/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTk5YjM0NC03ZThmLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo837oPFweMxctJJM5C_bkw5WqiBkzAPy7NmcIJWuF4=) | Team,

Governor Mike DeWine just added his signature to one of the most dangerous anti-voter bills in the country.

This bill punishes working Ohioans by putting up unnecessary barriers at the voting booth and making it harder for working families who rely on absentee or early voting to have their voices heard. **Take a look at what this bill will do:**
* End Ohioans’ ability to use utility bills, government documents, and alternative forms of identification to prove their identity and cast their vote

* Shorten the window for Ohioans to cast mail-in ballots

* Allow only one dropbox per county, even after Ohio courts decided that the limitation was unnecessary

* Eliminate in-person voting on the Monday before Election Day

* Prohibit most curbside voting

* Disenfranchise military voters.

Ohio Republicans know that their out-of-touch agenda and anti-worker policies are betraying Ohio voters, and they don’t want to be held accountable.

clean_body: Ohio Republicans know that their out-of-touch agenda and anti-worker policies are betraying Ohio voters, and they don’t want to be held accountable. = | Team, Governor Mike DeWine just added his signature to one of the most dangerous anti-voter bills in the country. This bill punishes working Ohioans by putting up unnecessary barriers at the voting booth and making it harder for working families who rely on absentee or early voting to have their voices heard. Take a look at what this bill will do: End Ohioans’ ability to use utility bills, government documents, and alternative forms of identification to prove their identity and cast their vote Shorten the window for Ohioans to cast mail-in ballots Allow only one dropbox per county, even after Ohio courts decided that the limitation was unnecessary Eliminate in-person voting on the Monday before Election Day Prohibit most curbside voting Disenfranchise military voters. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1569f10e74a4208935f660bf17cb350&_e=Nzm9hROsw6l_BY7WLOgXyu_FC49c4dEAB4xsy3KBhXfm-6LepzVbDqvkpFRdSvJlsAdLh8QUyyFe9f6zL4nC2kP-S4mDqB9w-wMaKWeXmLu9hzMNlWb7kamaFQCfo9bXWNA82S38Yum-JgOTJxA86VKS0HWxymdqiLSxGyPFR-bqD9dh827jaM5EmWWb3JA-HL5qXpzUkExV6_0L-gsQzUxnzMbJGDOmYSfyw2MHG2dNnFABJQA2QF239XBGTIsknKGBNYym8kFfVbJBCP-Bqhmo3kMMiXPUrGbJnkpetdI%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1569f10e74a4208935f660bf17cb350&_e=Nzm9hROsw6l_BY7WLOgXyu_FC49c4dEAB4xsy3KBhXfm-6LepzVbDqvkpFRdSvJlsAdLh8QUyyFe9f6zL4nC2kP-S4mDqB9w-wMaKWeXmLu9hzMNlWb7kamaFQCfo9bXWNA82S38Yum-JgOTJxA86e_hYP8ztPI8vHA1tY-rHF0r6vJkpur_NDbVtXbIPPQP1Ybse5ky3QcP1r_T5hpLWQN6y8MPxy7O4EDo3hS8vLI9zJuvjgSzuUZr816R1FHkMHR0Ps5QOA4MHTZrr5NQtn5ZzEKEIu-rNvp0bPmuX1U%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlkpls5g9dscm8fjelvka7f8gh8ahl1gjl0f79mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0iep5htlibg2rt39kd1rcmr7g9lq4lvo7dt6n80_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6colrok164p0jpu28qif2qbtlp13qe12acd8v3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zto0jl7r461miaqkse0vh5i3u7i0j0su03uq3cb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjpsja7q4vs1lslovcbr4rtis613hk39gqia2340_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1jmnl8oqnkvavkqo1sp3egbdk36pf3fr19ek2s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zscduao0jjj6sp53ti60n79hlojhd1nups19nn2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zde86f49da0q7qlam7a9j4l4s5l162u7shpa1sdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn7jhghgn1mqcrvli9f7a0n82ka52hkfc3mspang_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcq4vlghdja4agq6png7qhh8l78lf4u79ifihboo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znaqu227vftjagjndm4c151ihi34ckbqcahsq94o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6k77vn1dpr3njj83dt73caeak69jt16pbhgd5do_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr416ppcbedddd0a6tsmf4k3ku9sql63hllu45oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztpp98id2sa4vhktq6cni88p96ushim28kh9do60_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5lu6hfo3uoj91m8mtoou7knac09p90n3stvh2cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfk1djjnr4dhkcpbtg3077nfr2jcrpe2mlmkqak8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbp8ankbp5023622l5ndlsg61cht0816g40bk8rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za9u24gihg06fgvoo74que5fbekmr03ctkudu2i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z89ak0dcj4fs501mkmsd5lrg6fc2gt3ogag045i8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7gqj7i8ok0233o4bs4cfq817s2ikv9crd860p20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g60o70cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Criswell Not Seeking Re-Election
body:
|
---
| | Rep. Dana Criswell, District 6
---
On December 26th 2014, I sat down with my wife, Julie, and discussed my thoughts with her about running for the Mississippi legislature. I had never been elected to any position and was definitely a novice at politics. I didn’t know how to run a campaign, how to raise money or even how much money I needed to raise. I wasn't even 100% sure when the legislature was in session. But I did know that I felt the need to get involved because I felt our nation and our state were headed in the wrong direction.
That same year, I became a grandfather, and as many of you know, that seems to make you think more about the future than any other life event, because all of a sudden, there is someone you love and care about that needs a future where they can excel and be free.
Julie was not thrilled with the idea, especially when I explained it would require I use all of my vacation from my real job during the months the legislature was in session. But after a lengthy discussion, we made the decision to start the campaign.
I took $2,000 out of our savings account, printed up some signs and a couple hundred cards to hand out and off I went to give speeches. Running against an incumbent Republican was not popular amongst the party faithful, but luckily, most voters don't care as much about the etiquette of party politics as they care about electing someone who will represent their principles and values in government.
After 8 months of campaigning, which included knocking on over 3,500 doors, sending out mailers and giving speeches, I had spent well over the original amount but I was elected to represent the people of Olive Branch.
The real education began then when I was sworn in on the first Tuesday of January 2016 and became Representative Dana Criswell.
After now serving 8 years, I am proud of my accomplishments in the Mississippi legislature. I believe I have maintained the principles on which I campaigned even when pressured by local politicians who seem to desire more and more of the people's money and have almost no principles. I have never sold my vote for a position or for a donation from a lobbyist. I have withstood the ridicule of leadership because I refused to go along with their agenda to promote themselves at the expense of the people of Mississippi and I am satisfied that I have done this job and represented the people of District 6 to the best of my abilities.
I originally promised Julie that if elected I would serve one term and go home. But somewhere along the way I felt the need to serve a second term, so with some reluctance, Julie agreed and off I went to serve another 4 years.
Now that I have reached the conclusion of my second term, I know it is time for me to move on. I have never believed serving in politics should be a lifetime job. I don't celebrate those in the legislature who have been there 20 or 30 years.
I am thankful to my wife and the people of District 6 who allowed me an opportunity to do my duty and represent their conservative values in the Mississippi legislature.
If you are like me and want to make a difference to our state and country, I encourage you to consider running. Pray about what God may have you do, and how you can be a part of saving our State and Nation. Signing up to run for office is an easy process, but the deadline to do so is running out with just a few weeks left before the deadline.
Whoever steps up to replace me, I wish them well and encourage them to withstand the pressures to represent the political class instead of the people.
I am always available if I can be of service.
Dana
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/3Af0Ad-gYRGL4ueiA4_5eg) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw8l9PwxjjZ5LgvEARt0xqAelO5OLt6taOUEshSL-W5HgZjtSR-i5kfK1eo2DDCdmKTcoDRZ7B1De-2wyKBRkkCDEBTqmxMQKgYMIhGfduvXcZ006rWYgsML7nLz4et_zFg0OnLLdTT_j5U2OgMxr06I%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw70D1EUu3LmjAWgn_9jba1ivVCwiiXA034DfdGGjza2k9lO_UpsrafkKWB4jpT9RvEodbZwD2XTMpOuDOnzDSpUwf0Omu_QkcplBgZ5JAy3W15hNcIFNUi9yuz6s8_aQ04kCXxS4sEe_Sy8GVHrTIHs%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw7mDP6PHupmXN2ACu9Pmx779k-hh254Cd40kC-cAVSfJZKGJBs0H4e6dIkNwrrv0EU2u-4W1CBmL-hv6yrCfv-T1tOUhvino7Y9mmDyjFO8ZVjMMukDP_8PWMDEZui333S0Ei-705Gnf25aICDCHOY4%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw6mk3fTzgO6Twb58UHgMHRyAblp98qOjBlLJu7qNsOnjWv3FAYwb9rzkQDzLWzBgV2dO2Wg4OTi02YOjTHDCSbXQeIVAM8aZ5z-TJdklYj8Uzk4keYBblZTvExb0zHe7MP7RfKX-bCgYaL6laWYqv98%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFwzNLBQroIj-VZIpB1tvq4FTSSsFrhnXoe_pDfRRygmrJBHFDEOA-edcOyoulX5SOf2zjLGgWChNBhX2R9Wui5TY1d9fg61pqkU-zodieIJTydgO1wa4V6rlVGRqskd3L1ciMVbt6M09d0bGSTn1Rh-w%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw1MNmoud3Y4HLBpBzNoE2ZFhnDeMgn4uJu1gAYlnAVfeoyQyB8vNJgVgSFLmkTGZuix8YsQvtWhD5gBaD5jZloSRjXx0mV3sOCFfmIcaDsJlD86RAR-n0BxzhGdIbY1EV7vZIOJmUh2zznSpQLv7r3w%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw0M8jiGfu3icGWTcL5QbNa7aqyI0fTakhKZC3VUpYY7gJZ3kcDMbnOE6hfb90afO1vsxSOf-3S3bfyBLwyBTPBh0ejJVR1_h9a2hXO1D959VaCHeIdmNfob079vsxRoCpQiLe_g2w2HmHxWnrkE3j80%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fee20695fad4b61bb103feaf5a34976&_e=d3js9ZFhhSiMVGi6eaO8tXR6EMlOY7Mp8xz6DZicx03plmkf-PK0c8i4GkxcWs38ml4zXPsov3Ui0jaK1FudMkRSRjzY6AN22FD5Ni5dJnE-UylCGpWsZ-1A-C5CaL-17KUtkQ55yTyk5OhN--BFw0hcpmHmDNwZidajt3p-2a1nEzJ-ZZoe_HMbN41xrGACT4NOeOisZ6K8QB__pDyvuLjTVwrNZGI744ll48Ane9zx-R0ewhwvpW7fx56GbQyuwvRT-yTs3dpMocZ099yjWWvBrJZbE1GkSb4hRjDBER0%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4daf747e87f94ca79266d630661a2033&_e=LV7im76EWiXR8Gg4lZ-EKDeqa8BLsflnVuT3PsRtQ-oGtJZYHFBBXqvz0YEP45xpfaa0hkDzqBSfIx1MDCy8lh4G1GPs4MvyQdjLILJx-_8El6NNmVA2PiSbditrQrnql7V4fcfIzh4gU9rzWQFlOVmFs_B0DqHfsaUTPNvTt4eGzXjDZ7TE3I7aqbWugyyMCaCNSbKg7zc_8_zy17wiaV5OudxBrOF9CXtU9fmBiV_MBKXUjWBjah6QytpNSAuS_L1uh2e8BJPgUX7wveDzYw1-NlwsoLjfiMmq6leYuQY%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. subject: ALERT: Statement from Congresswoman Mary Miller on Conservative Policy Victories
body:
Rep. Miller provides Illinois Review with a statement on the deal struck to secure enough votes to elect Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0889d18dfc8a/alert-statement-from-congresswoman-mary-miller-on-conservative-policy-victories?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=109918288e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_08_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-109918288e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Rep. Miller: Statement on Conservative Policy Victories in Speakership Negotiations (https://twitter.com/RepMaryMiller/status/1611802932420268032?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=109918288e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_08_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-109918288e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Exclusive: Congresswoman Mary Miller (https://marymiller.house.gov/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=109918288e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_08_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-109918288e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , R, IL-15 provides Illinois Review with a statement on the deal struck late Friday night to secure enough votes to elect Congressman Kevin McCarthy (https://kevinmccarthy.house.gov/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=109918288e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_08_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-109918288e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , R, CA-20 as the 55th Speaker of the House.
https://twitter.com/IllinoisReview/status/1611768995107209216?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=109918288e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_08_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-109918288e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Rep. Miller's official statement, which may be found on her official Twitter (https://twitter.com/RepMaryMiller/status/1611802932420268032?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=109918288e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_08_02_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-109918288e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) account, is reproduced below:

clean_body: Rep. Miller provides Illinois Review with a statement on the deal struck to secure enough votes to elect Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats begin 2023 prepared to deliver for their constituents, while Republicans continue to restrict abortionaccess… and everything else you need to know in the states recently.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb38590ovch5lj10ldf3seeonsipdcbojee18sd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z94knkdcktuu3bm1dopomgk669alg49cfu6babv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt2973tr5k9vmdka8qp6lbd1cvn6ha4047nue4dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfbom0dq3q4pv9iijdahbeccgpphjaet3qnet2s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbjore7kfggfm9mq82dpg2sr9b4ner12gf3koe60_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr0ckcr9oktuth12ai9l9r2vb7m942m4i5k1kibg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaiurglfi5bibuegg97pm1ablcffvcv4sj3p2ev0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3v7fj3e57vqntlhcdad8m0a2vdge9e79177q6ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3fb26ook629j5cs4f63e1b7piv5ipmo9vvt5ae0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z29jod2bsat5df6ihsqp5f52c0d6vo8n3ladqdjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7nmdqjirerhbp99p0gt51dn52tphb4uddv5oeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7841lq9emgue915u7c645sla0mki0andi6amc8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zecvgphqspmgoa5fnk8mjsvmc9tsj6sjbmlfdpm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2j1o1vij561bhei80oth5628hdgpq5gfvv4u9oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69hckk21e0631biop8tua26p9a6ih2urrvufh8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhfb5aqlpbfsh207oh25ev80pn8ta21m6srgbrvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zefqj3mutuml4mmo1idbllof9uvgk3m294h63ceg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1lnnj64h1f2nu5faobcs0a6um7c581le793sing_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c9g62ob4c9h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zo6gm8q7c2bd1roo4b8qc9svv62fkbjinhslk8h8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z723mm9rqjmbivlrsfp857polhaqivmnipn2rrn0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cph60ob1chh649fg)

Breaking news this morning from the physicians at UCMC shows that Damar Hamlin is awake and speaking, and, most importantly, his neurological function appears to have remained intact. UCMC staff also broke the news that Hamlin is now breathing on his own, and no longer needs the assistance of oxygen and breathing tubes.

Leonard Whiting and Olivia Hussey, who starred in Romeo and Juliet (1968) are suing Paramount Pictures for $500 million, claiming that their nude scenes were “secretly and unlawfully obtained.” At the time of production in 1968, Leonard Whiting was 16 years old, while Olivia Hussey was 15 years old.

And what have the Republicans spent their first few days in power doing? body:
The mere fact that you opened up this email on a Sunday morning says something important about you.
#
Derek -
The mere fact that you opened up this email on a Sunday morning says something important about you.
It says you care.
It says you care about the future of this country and our democracy.
It says you care about elections because you know their outcomes have consequences for you, those you care about and even people you’ve never met before.
But you also probably know that something feels not right in politics. You probably know the far-right disinformation and attacks on our democracy are not healthy.
You probably know that candidates like Kari Lake, Blake Masters, Herschel Walker, are not signs of a healthy Republican Party. And that is to say nothing about Donald Trump.
And you probably also know by now that VoteVets is one of the most effective organizations in the fight to defeat those far-right forces and defend our democracy.
Now if everyone who received this email contributed just $10 to VoteVets, we’d meet our budget goals for the first quarter of the year. But not everyone gives. That’s why we’re asking those who care to step up today. So please:

There are only a few days left to make an impact on this critical race — = \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Virginia Democrats <info@vademocrats.org> Date: Wed, Jan 4, 2023 Subject: Abortion is on the Ballot Next Week To: dpwillis67@gmail.com = Derek, Abortion rights are on the ballot next week. The race in SD-07 could decide whether or not reproductive freedoms are preserved in the Commonwealth. Democrats’ majority in the Virginia Senate is razor-thin. It’s essential that we send Aaron Rouse to Richmond next Tuesday to add another brick to the Senate Dems’ “brick wall,” stopping Glenn Youngkin’s extreme abortion ban in its tracks. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** We need Democrats in every corner of our Commonwealth to chip in and contribute to a Democratic victory in SD-07. = Virginia Democrats =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The shortest House majority in history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1556%2E5257348%2E-0dPBa ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Did you hear that, Derek?

That rumble in the distance? Has the circus come to town?

That’s the sound of House Democrats letting out a collective groan at
Kevin McCarthy’s mind-numbing opening remarks to kick off his brand new
Republican House majority.

We are talking about an individual tasked with running a chamber of
Congress — part of running the federal government! — whose agenda most
closely resembles your crazy uncle’s social media feed from Facebook...or
Twitter...or the Trump site run by McCarthy’s old pal Devin Nunes, Truth
Social.

Here’s a live look at how I’m feeling about Kevin!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=jan2023_abs_em.c5g5-1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230108_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1556%2E5257348%2E-0dPBa ]Gif of Adam Schiff stating on television, 'He has no business being in
Congress'

McCarthy’s remarks read like an Alex Jones InfoWars rant. I mean
seriously, Marjorie Taylor Greene might as well be Speaker.

(With the zero-margin for error McCarthy is working with, she pretty much
is.)

And we’re going to have to deal with this...for two...entire...years.

If you’re feeling like I do right now, here’s something productive you can
do:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=jan2023_abs_em.c5g5-1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230108_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1556%2E5257348%2E-0dPBa ]Chip in $5 right now to make sure that Kevin McCarthy is leader of the
most short-lived House majority in history.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c024bd4baf204b9a81815dec553d3468&_e=9XTl021jo16W1o4o1y4vvUEEfUnXarfpuDHkt2qs74mqBRtVGU5sVyCA1iu2iDpuHN6ba4vIm8h31XDvE_OxM5zjwDjFjB4ei6jB9eEymImvfrwHKiCvWnVcUzN7PQc3VC1EeJB3_jUYBaVJesy3D5hHp7dPXg32px-ZGBK2GYcO48t4h0Vj0KXwKRBgM-gO-JXKP1eNVDhNB_IjKLf1Ys-xknF9-kATo7bn3vR2SNSijSCOa6YraSIMtk6miJxPSc-z8371P-EnIy1pqmTomjiu--aPnDQ7WaCoQwJKHq0%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c024bd4baf204b9a81815dec553d3468&_e=9XTl021jo16W1o4o1y4vvUEEfUnXarfpuDHkt2qs74mqBRtVGU5sVyCA1iu2iDpuHN6ba4vIm8h31XDvE_OxM5zjwDjFjB4ei6jB9eEymImvfrwHKiCvWnVcUzN7PQc3VC1EeJB3_jUYBaVJesy3D-SJnMrOSVnsEMs7Dfm9FAXFb3c6YLL3jt9OYRTOFdYLlOQm9vc2MmlwvYY5diec-yyzC7GIKYtjq0dyc8E4lrO1MHrCYhKgBq8YtsU6t2jFwQ-ZGefpAZixhYcyoyw2X2vJjDtnEXtWmmNCsj9oQ1w%3D)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c024bd4baf204b9a81815dec553d3468&_e=9XTl021jo16W1o4o1y4vvUEEfUnXarfpuDHkt2qs74mqBRtVGU5sVyCA1iu2iDpuHN6ba4vIm8h31XDvE_OxM5zjwDjFjB4ei6jB9eEymImvfrwHKiCvWnVcUzN7PQc3VC1EeJB3_jUYBaVJesy3D948Xpi0LCkGWlSrkO6gYcNjEolYaOgtoeNLkX3NmMOz2T7SmU486olyedBcXgkL4o9RQcR9VeZWYuikNfYMxKNwXVaHGzZjF34ur9_Lg1-q4_udqsrFVyxwABnEluZajJEKuEyqao_I1Pg_5Gs4MIM%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c024bd4baf204b9a81815dec553d3468&_e=9XTl021jo16W1o4o1y4vvUEEfUnXarfpuDHkt2qs74mqBRtVGU5sVyCA1iu2iDpuHN6ba4vIm8h31XDvE_OxM5zjwDjFjB4ei6jB9eEymImvfrwHKiCvWnVcUzN7PQc3VC1EeJB3_jUYBaVJesy3D_Z85FKVGFuAHsHCBIufeQpxsail2RZ1YTaBxc31kJ-8TGlCzgyQ_aB9Vuh-L9smPLXuSqdqK3AAvKkRe8vWY9mHCBzduyyw6p9nAzJMXeI6lPDiiPtPxJ_WzjuGJvoBc9Mt-Jit6Y9Vl74T4t6vpdI%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c024bd4baf204b9a81815dec553d3468&_e=9XTl021jo16W1o4o1y4vvUEEfUnXarfpuDHkt2qs74mqBRtVGU5sVyCA1iu2iDpuHN6ba4vIm8h31XDvE_OxM5zjwDjFjB4ei6jB9eEymImvfrwHKiCvWnVcUzN7PQc3VC1EeJB3_jUYBaVJesy3Dz36KDKFhdDRarXp-04v-6G_gtwRT26_giJfv2slqEIN3YicATm8V9KZbAxXy289JKRduZwCXQLfqV8F1j5VTV0jA2q61XlQcxZB8RoKvz4fROtqI65kdRdh9NPneTZ0rmEbe2DBdTI2uROCRqfykvE%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c024bd4baf204b9a81815dec553d3468&_e=9XTl021jo16W1o4o1y4vvUEEfUnXarfpuDHkt2qs74mqBRtVGU5sVyCA1iu2iDpuHN6ba4vIm8h31XDvE_OxM5zjwDjFjB4ei6jB9eEymImvfrwHKiCvWnVcUzN7PQc3VC1EeJB3_jUYBaVJesy3DxzsV-Sac9uD0EBANgQM9K9hZqqiSFxFW7DV24wxRx1_c-ufXEn45Bd7RomZn2SNQ34gZ_N7N7Dsqph1L85IiIKMD3dOdTqNf0_hFT0XpdczlRa0CzoqvedAE3R_Di00GikOD35_q5kx-MBIYm2X4ZM%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Joe Biden is coming to the border today... and they're staging a fake scene for him to arrive to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fc2ebdae12&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,718 days after being sworn in Joe Biden has finally found the time to get to the Southern Border and see the mess that he has made.Can you believe that it’s taken so long for him to get down here?El Paso has been under siege for months by illegal aliens who keep coming here and make this their dumping ground.It’s a problem for me. This is my community. This is where I raise my children. My husband used to work on Border Patrol and he knows exactly what is going on. It is a TOTAL MESS!Now, El Paso is being cleaned up so Biden can visit and lie that things are going just fine. Let me show you a picture of what this town looked like on Thursday:
And now that Biden is coming, all the evidence of the Border Crisis is gone.
Same sidewalk. Looks different, doesn’t it?Joe Biden is coming here to LIE to the country. The Border Security Coalition is NOT going to let that happen. We’re going to be out protesting this visit in a **MAJOR** way.
| [SUPORT THE BORDER SECURITY COALITION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5c0accde86&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Irene Armendariz-Jackson, a lifelong resident of El Paso. My parents LEGALLY immigrated here from Mexico. They didn’t do it the **ILLEGAL** way. They followed the rules and did what is right.The establishment hates the Border Security Coalition because neither party ACTUALLY wants to fix the Border issue. **It’s sad but true**. We have some good politicians who do want to fix it but when you get to the establishment types... **they’re blocking us at every instance.** Look at how hard the 20 holdouts had to fight to get a vote on the Texas Border Security Plan. Our PAC is going to fund candidates who have a concrete plan to secure our border and **DEFEAT** those who want to continue the mass invasion. We can’t settle for 20 Republicans who will fight. We need a majority. And **YOU** can help me do it.
| [CLICK HERE: SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f7c7ed8336&e=fdefed58de)
---
I want to show the establishments of BOTH parties that if they don’t secure our borders, we will defeat them. **And that’s where you come in.** The only language these people understand is money, so we need to speak what they understand. That’s why I’m asking you for **your donatio** n today. We want to be able to say that we have an organization supported by THOUSANDS of like-minded patriots who will NOT support any candidate without a plan to stop the invasion.So, whether it was $5.00 or $500, we need your support today. There is power in numbers. There is no organization like ours. We can do this, but you’re going to have to help us. **Click below and let’s stop the invasion of America.****We are aiming to get 400 new donors to our coalition today so that by the time Joe Biden gets here we can do media rounds and speak with CREDIBILITY on the TRUTH that is going on at our border.****NO MORE LIES, JOE!**
| [DONATE $5.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=15cd9f1bd4&e=fdefed58de)

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2408c88a863348449148bbab64b35ab8&_e=6xLc9iac3_ZnEsYAA5a0ggtLzZKfOk3n77gC5ZockSg0gLu24w7599WafiTo85rfS30WOs9YQLWolBXeo5y47sqcNxJ9J2hGlKsirM7UlXS54FcbI0_mROQR71YvA5FFAZkYfZvVSRCT4jepnaVc2Tu99mgAxyrrYfKlUfIyllTZDPp1C2wohqqtM-uei0tPLiXRAQQlu9-lqTe3NK2Ensk8O0nGXivRaFWI_h-CrVicU2DKxcGCrgxQFJh4va-1tZ2UBSkENPDc0vJwdIgL5Ag-sh_6K0Bm5rgZganex_A%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2408c88a863348449148bbab64b35ab8&_e=6xLc9iac3_ZnEsYAA5a0ggtLzZKfOk3n77gC5ZockSg0gLu24w7599WafiTo85rfS30WOs9YQLWolBXeo5y47sqcNxJ9J2hGlKsirM7UlXS54FcbI0_mROQR71YvA5FFAZkYfZvVSRCT4jepnaVc2UWzwWRbFVj299CPMZ_ERL30wOTuUCKGwVFN8lUMEPZaidMIOrDvRIcNJbnBRT2FPIf-xW4UpVZ_q0XNjV5SQmyMmGod5q9Cqp1JMTtm-mkv2Js_uDxCwajF_8SQsXvwrcVz2ersCxOSrsCjpTxw73A%3D) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2408c88a863348449148bbab64b35ab8&_e=6xLc9iac3_ZnEsYAA5a0ggtLzZKfOk3n77gC5ZockSg0gLu24w7599WafiTo85rfS30WOs9YQLWolBXeo5y47sqcNxJ9J2hGlKsirM7UlXS54FcbI0_mROQR71YvA5FFAZkYfZvVSRCT4jepnaVc2aNuvQGzaNCZElEJxPIdCmzHmOiGmzaGIk2_jd7jACe2DrgRGCTK1v8d7doVltepsiq6e6_nRYm888DzhkZigKjTNGzYyQVlUGgV6MvarlSveQzJr8mY2bnS-t0wDw1bLg4ZiHDmjddEGWR6p2VMpng%3D) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2408c88a863348449148bbab64b35ab8&_e=6xLc9iac3_ZnEsYAA5a0ggtLzZKfOk3n77gC5ZockSg0gLu24w7599WafiTo85rfS30WOs9YQLWolBXeo5y47sqcNxJ9J2hGlKsirM7UlXS54FcbI0_mROQR71YvA5FFAZkYfZvVSRCT4jepnaVc2aPgZrMbE7mvchWEYUvYw2YYBJZ9LDY0CPh76MGiy5_KqHC3wEAGCVsAyhZWedOhhqYy87nCUmsg4pf_-bzOO1ACc6jcqNgcKsYC52aKHhxCbNV1MvrOZN_v3kLaGpTzNcTEDUoaT1MajGSQE4zuihY%3D) You need to get 'er done today. Why?
