name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kb8-k7Ah33uG356mRG3fWwYBVfDXL3-dB89LFfXcBzBrFX0MZLQbdEHeZCFlcmYm-CWZNtFINOjORGeCPNqxIn6hDjxtTIyLDzm9spJK-0cFEd-nDcommibDljlPL31mGg2-LRullj13Mp4ymuQIMLM%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kSh5Rng4RBGxoIWC7JUScCW-wm1P_XIc4b115rjKFZZ2k77L9gGNYYf9yGU1bIRHe0aicA6KMvHXWA3aK8MaOGkoa_XqYWrGLp-ccAGI5qQ2ltZCb6xU0VUZl0Akcucanyemgs9F9DkwZ8PB8APeTfs%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kRBbejtk--sxUwC1PAnX-a0Kb6ZWaQXKK72WEvRQ-ChgDORGQ54pKX5o7q9zmkgGrgAGSUin3kTqCryHs8Uw-vdH_IVgxy-5_vr__8u1ZOADkbJjyz7dQw10fEqyrIxhJgl1VRWQ6UXMyl6tuoIa9pk%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kZDC3-oqO3psjh5XrcgjTsffi975l3f3OisX4952sAiMZJuiwiLl1iFGXTCJswSufxdi443Z1u5lbevolOOeG4E-FcJES9DMMxAvTgFGd5sYCYJYhNTd4gEvY6FrmNu0swAHXoQn-K0Adle4Z56kajo%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kYJ0HV41zapFyEOlJoDUSNgZuXluUFUtfB1VuPxZL4kgejLJak7IcDv7rgaG1yPhzshjHfloUiQkno1tZ-akZw2r0byMIg13oeYPbPQymwoq9kVk0kcr3EMQVL7XnNxhiTSbBHjnCo1tn2fbZyluy7o%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kXALyWrHTV6mELY655Yh4m09F4LgSLhxSGadTyL8aoEXge25iagP9Bz9jimcjZqzGDqZyHs5Uq1e_8SnAvFVHU9yv7sjqCrh0ziZI2FFLU7ivOfRtaXW4Vxb_RQxka-_nyxeEdAPztwzGnG5E5NYUnA%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kWC0p9Y_X45uSXlQlbtN64wS7eohQ43D-9lSUWc7K2w2Xj-Qfnu8YDog1FcRLr70CbTi_EQhHQKLUnHHQweaYw-Kytr_YYGW0zMaos6sSANSqpCK9Mbf3n33MPmYcWKgyl7s8mYQV-zWw9oqkLIH7rk%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQkvh9B4snz5eAgHxpxU14kT83JMdHgpPdOXOSubE2hTDuWCWDIoHNtGVN4R1w5dIS_K_0XVySwmA_ktEP6R579vnpUtNpO8_JMDdu9UxQ5ZH-xdZEooksjgiS8T4UQPGgoyxEDtwd13UjLaAuMgcrYqPAyrFRLptqnrX-1sRkARA%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQ9qwFJrFKY1tD5TFjLWNzS7MZ1bTBOvZgCvjq3lyiLd_OFI5c0Ifck6Kpub87CTpl6ltBAFJfud1zcfztEMawv-b1YJh2IcaIutiTnRCOdHf1JUH3rINOuSVFvyJxYR6ovVD3o9b-pSPXIHyaGq-OFoPqmuwvnNqGbnPLzL4de-g%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9610706c643440f8812d14d16d0951a0&_e=Gf17Sa4gwsQBtALEDcixxstvmnoiOSxzySU1hlMbZcgR776pFQbI-s_z-WXotTnDwDFAvO4jxzFnD6ZW80RA0ROVoXCBCGCil_Rqr8aH0cRA0dk9Sy_sSjEJhcJaLWBQRv5igXn67UE8ctf8ArhVOEVkCGh0gHzuC5letXqJu7w2VbuzLB80wBZDigU-X_cTxBi9mg1-X3qJ7DYjlTdXbEmQJVLeTRvspn01jf9FuZJobZioVUpo5BRCKHVcf6mC-xkO1G-MxZvg9NM43OIwHpdvut8cYG1rmC3kjngCrio%3D)

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
|
#
Hi Peter, **[I’m reaching out to ask you to chip in to my campaign for Senate in 2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57069761/386773542/476042345?refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_IN_20230108_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWJhMmQ3Yi04NzhmLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEGaKL7jl9JT1KO2UpM_KcCE5-OoaELydTgKJzw6vFQ=)** , but first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Already, pundits and pollsters are forecasting which Senate races will be most competitive in 2024, and **Wisconsin is consistently on the top of that list.** Although we won by double digits in 2018 (_thanks to your support!_), Wisconsin has proven to be a true toss-up state where races are won and lost by incredibly close margins. In the past two elections, President Joe Biden won by just 0.6% in 2020 and Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by 1% this past November. In 2024, my seat is going to be a top target for Republicans trying to retake the Senate majority — and with a presidential race alongside our campaign, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to tilt the scales in their favor. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: **Can you pitch in $5 or anything you can to be an early supporter of my race? I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: Can you pitch in $5 or anything you can to be an early supporter of my race? A contribution now pays off big-time for the coming months as we move full steam ahead toward Election Day 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for your continued support. I know it’s early to be thinking about 2024, but it’s so important to plan ahead! — Tammy PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

Aruna here, Maryland’s Lieutenant Governor-elect! It’s been a busy few weeks getting ready to take the oath of office. Here’s some of what I’ve been up to: > Joined the Sierra Club at their environmental summit to discuss combating climate change, > Hosted policy town halls with Governor-elect Moore on everything from public safety and the economy to transportation and education, and; > Wrangled three dogs and three cats (plus seven humans) into one family holiday photo. Between town halls, meetings, and time with our family for the holidays, Wes and I haven’t had much time to fundraise, so _**we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us rebuild our campaign’s infrastructure before the January 18 fundraising freeze.**_ **[Friend, we only have 10 more days to reach our goal. Can you pitch in $10 or more to help sustain our movement before we have to STOP fundraising at 12:00 am on January 18?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57072335/386810022/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230108deadline3_am_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDhjNjIxZi1iOThmLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFzbqBwyfVNYhQmvvLP3AAj2kUTHQQU92ENtMyYln7E=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: Joe Biden is coming to the border today... and they're staging a fake scene for him to arrive to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9c967ee2da&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,718 days after being sworn in Joe Biden has finally found the time to get to the Southern Border and see the mess that he has made.Can you believe that it’s taken so long for him to get down here?El Paso has been under siege for months by illegal aliens who keep coming here and make this their dumping ground.It’s a problem for me. This is my community. This is where I raise my children. My husband used to work on Border Patrol and he knows exactly what is going on. It is a TOTAL MESS!Now, El Paso is being cleaned up so Biden can visit and lie that things are going just fine. Let me show you a picture of what this town looked like on Thursday:
And now that Biden is coming, all the evidence of the Border Crisis is gone.
Same sidewalk. Looks different, doesn’t it?Joe Biden is coming here to LIE to the country. The Border Security Coalition is NOT going to let that happen. We’re going to be out protesting this visit in a **MAJOR** way.
| [SUPORT THE BORDER SECURITY COALITION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f2da0970fc&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Irene Armendariz-Jackson, a lifelong resident of El Paso. My parents LEGALLY immigrated here from Mexico. They didn’t do it the **ILLEGAL** way. They followed the rules and did what is right.The establishment hates the Border Security Coalition because neither party ACTUALLY wants to fix the Border issue. **It’s sad but true**. We have some good politicians who do want to fix it but when you get to the establishment types... **they’re blocking us at every instance.** Look at how hard the 20 holdouts had to fight to get a vote on the Texas Border Security Plan. Our PAC is going to fund candidates who have a concrete plan to secure our border and **DEFEAT** those who want to continue the mass invasion. We can’t settle for 20 Republicans who will fight. We need a majority. And **YOU** can help me do it.
| [CLICK HERE: SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cb56c85c92&e=fdefed58de)
---
I want to show the establishments of BOTH parties that if they don’t secure our borders, we will defeat them. **And that’s where you come in.** The only language these people understand is money, so we need to speak what they understand. That’s why I’m asking you for **your donatio** n today. We want to be able to say that we have an organization supported by THOUSANDS of like-minded patriots who will NOT support any candidate without a plan to stop the invasion.So, whether it was $5.00 or $500, we need your support today. There is power in numbers. There is no organization like ours. We can do this, but you’re going to have to help us. **Click below and let’s stop the invasion of America.****We are aiming to get 400 new donors to our coalition today so that by the time Joe Biden gets here we can do media rounds and speak with CREDIBILITY on the TRUTH that is going on at our border.****NO MORE LIES, JOE!**
| [DONATE $5.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5a3ff4828e&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $15.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=64eabb02ff&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $40.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=56541ba13b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $100](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8651673a8a&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $500](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6654b145fa&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE ANYTHING](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fe792e8b1d&e=fdefed58de)
---
The very existence of America depends on our success. Let’s make sure that we handle this now before it’s too late... and honestly, it really is almost too late.Sincerely,Irene Armendariz-Jackson

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Abortion rights are on the ballot in Virginia this Tuesday in a pivotal state senate race
body:
Important state election this week
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T936f8ff6-fa53-406d-93e8-c2439baf1aff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_We are only 2 days from a race that could turn Virginia into a state actively hostile to all women, treating_**** _ half the population as Handmaid's-Tale-like vassals of the state._** [**_To prevent this tragedy, will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 to Aaron Rouse RIGHT NOW, to use immediately in a winning effort on Tuesday?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee1413ef-fc79-4d8f-a9c8-e269244fa76c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This coming Tuesday, January 10th, is a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat. Why is this so crucial: Because anti-choice fanatic _Glenn Youngk is Governor. Republicans also control the state house. Our paper-thin, 21-19 majority in the state senate is all that stands between Virginia women and Republican promises to make women second class citizens. **There are two problems, though. ** **1) **The Manchin problem. One Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as "prof-life" and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion **2)** The open state senate seat to be filled Tuesday. If Republicans win, they'll just need Morissey to join them in voting against abortion--and it'll be banned in all cases.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45c68200-8d25-491f-9595-19e24322a04d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**If we elect **_**_abortion-rights champion, Aaron Rouse, we'll protect _all_ the rights of 8.6 million Virginians. If we allow his opponent, extremist Kevin Adams to win, abortion becomes illegal in the Old Dominion. _**_**This will lead to women sustaining grievous injuries--even death--because of doctors too scared to treat them.**_ **_Rarely does one state senate seat make the difference._ _This one does. _** [**_What we do NOW will determine if Virginia women are forced to_**** _ hand over control of their bedrooms and doctors offices to Peeping Toms in the state legislature._****_ To prevent this tragedy, will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 to Aaron Rouse RIGHT NOW, to use immediately in a winning effort on Tuesday?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1afddc38-b6d0-4dbb-a5f6-0364af0124e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for all women, for never giving into the tyrants who wish to control their most fundamental decision in their lives._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d6e508e-09ef-4dbd-9506-fd3c35b8c3f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Arizona on the line (via VPP)
subject: can we still reach you at this email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we can’t afford to lose an INCH of momentum...
| Are you still checking this email address?? We reached out to you about the sky-high stakes of the 2024 Arizona Senate race, but hardly anyone has chipped in...

[**_Can you rush $7 towards our $12,000 goal before it expires at midnight? With our fragile one-seat Senate majority on the line, we can’t afford to get complacent »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38129?t=6&akid=5985%2E878179%2EvLO4tq) | [CHIP IN $7 NOW TO REPLACE KYRSTEN SINEMA WITH A REAL DEMOCRAT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38129?t=7&akid=5985%2E878179%2EvLO4tq)
---
We’ll be up front with you:

**_IF_** we come together and start organizing right now, Democrats have a real chance of flipping Sinema’s seat blue and SAVING the Senate.

name: Team Sherrod
subject: We don’t need to imagine what the GOP would do with the Senate Majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Republicans control the House Majority now, and they’re threatening to hold debt ceiling negotiations hostage -- potentially sending our economy into financial crisis and devastating the economic well-being of working families -- all so they can make drastic cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
According to The Hill , “The mere threat of default can generate costs for virtually all Americans.” Republicans’ actions threaten Americans’ retirement accounts, veterans’ benefits, and Social Security payments.
We don’t need to wonder if Senate Republicans would try something similar -- they’ve already said they want to .
Next year, Senate Republicans only need to flip two seats to take back control of the Majority (and only one if they win the presidency). And according to POLITICO , Democrats are facing a “brutal 2024 map.”
We can’t leave anything up to chance. We need to put in the work now for a competitive, expensive race, and we’re counting on your help. Will you chip in a few dollars today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230108]
Republicans are playing political games with Americans’ livelihoods. We need to start preparing for 2024 now so we can defend critical seats like Sherrod’s and stop the GOP’s agenda in its tracks.
Any amount you can contribute would help us do just that. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230108]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Bad news: we have debt. Good news: we won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Can I count on your help today?
| | |
---
_Hi – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. In order to win, my (victorious!) campaign took on a bit of debt and now we have a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.**[Before I go on, will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57071826/386786415/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2175-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc4MzkyYy1hODhmLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw92Lpqn3h2dvghl5JQMDefGKfYcto9BqFNjKUI-4Gs=)**_
|
---
Look – in the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State.

GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED. Polls tightened to within a point or two. Outside spending was through the roof.

My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making quick decisions with the information we had, hoping that the additional funding we needed would come through.

Despite our best efforts, the necessary funding _didn’t_ come through and now my campaign has some debt to make up to pay the last of our bills. We made a pretty good dent in it before the end of the year, but we’ve still got a little more to go. Since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to help:

**[Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give, and it’ll really help me focus on legislating (not fundraising!).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57071827/386786416/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2175-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc4MzkyYy1hODhmLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw92Lpqn3h2dvghl5JQMDefGKfYcto9BqFNjKUI-4Gs=)**

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.

If you’re able to help, you can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57071828/386786417/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2175-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDc4MzkyYy1hODhmLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw92Lpqn3h2dvghl5JQMDefGKfYcto9BqFNjKUI-4Gs=)**

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
